Chronology
2005 in KSW 2006 in Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki 2007 in KSW

The year 2006 was the third year in the history of the Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki, a mixed martial arts promotion based in Poland. In 2006 Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki held 2 events beginning with, KSW V: Konfrontacja.

List of events

[edit]
# Event title Date Arena Location
1 KSW V: Konfrontacja June 3, 2005 Hotel Marriott Warsaw, Poland
2 KSW VI: Konfrontacja October 14, 2006 Hala Torwar Warsaw, Poland

KSW V: Konfrontacja

[edit]
KSW V: Konfrontacja
PromotionKonfrontacja Sztuk Walki
DateJune 3, 2006
VenueHotel Marriott
City Warsaw, Poland
Event chronology
KSW 4 KSW V: Konfrontacja KSW 6

KSW V: Konfrontacja[1] was a mixed martial arts event held on June 3, 2006 at the Hotel Marriott in Warsaw, Poland.

Light Heavyweight 93 kg Jordan Radev def. Martin Malkhasyan Decision (Unanimous) 2 Tournament Quarter-Finals 3
Light Heavyweight 93 kg Robert Jocz def. Neno Alilovic TKO (Submission to punches) 1 Tournament Quarter-Finals 2

KSW VI: Konfrontacja

[edit]
KSW VI: Konfrontacja
PromotionKonfrontacja Sztuk Walki
DateOctober 14, 2006
VenueTorwar Hall
City Warsaw, Poland
Event chronology
KSW 5 KSW VI: Konfrontacja KSW 7

KSW VI: Konfrontacja[2] was a mixed martial arts event held on October 14, 2006 at the Torwar Hall in Warsaw, Poland . Alistair Overeem was a special guest at the event.

Results

[edit]

Light Heavyweight 93 kg Michał Materla def. Valdas Pocevicius Submission (Rear-Naked Choke) 1 Tournament Semi-Finals 2
